                         │                  Commands    Keybindings    About                  │                         
                         │────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────│                         
                         │  /clear    Clear conversation history                              │                         
                         │  /help     Show help dialog                                        │                         
                         │  /context  Show context usage                                      │                         
                         │  /stats    Show usage statistics                                   │                         
                         │  /quit     Quit the TUI                                            │                         
                         │                                                                    │
